subtitle: Start using private AI sooner
userFacingDescription: Basic document cleanup, short summaries, simple case questions over small files, and basic chronology extraction.

subtitle: Recommended for most advocates
userFacingDescription: Source-backed case Q&A, 50+ page PDF summarization, chronologies, issue extraction, order summaries, and evidence review.

subtitle: Best for longer files and detailed drafts
userFacingDescription: Longer-document workflows, more detailed drafting, stronger bilingual handling, senior counsel briefs, and deeper issue analysis.
